trivia_bullets.text: Green Creature — Wurm Horror uncommon (MKM, no. 158, February 9, 2024), illustrated by Slawomir Maniak. Compound type 'Wurm Horror' places it in MKM's monster-in-the-sewers character space.

Disguise mechanic: named variant of Morph, cast face down as 2/2 with ward {2} for {3}, reveal at any time. Design team renamed 'Cloak' to 'Disguise' in final development to match murder-mystery genre vocabulary.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Murders at Karlov Manor Mechanics

trivia_bullets.text: "The bite at the end of the tunnel." Inverts the 'light at the end of the tunnel' idiom so the predator is the payoff, not salvation.
Enter/face-up trigger forces a target creature to block if able. 4/5 statline at reveal cost {4}{G} trades up on nearly anything forced to block it.
Showcase Dossier variant exists at collector number 351 in MKM Variants, with alternate crime-file art style presentation.

related_cards.name: Forum Familiar
related_cards.note: shares Disguise mechanic; both in BBL disguise symbol node

related_cards.name: Topiary Panther
related_cards.note: Disguise creature in green; face-down predator cluster
